{"society_power": 4.5, "state_power": 5.5, "society_change": -1.5, "state_change": 0.5, "key_event": "PF democratic erosion; media/opposition crackdowns amid 2020 debt default", "reasoning": "Civil society was progressively squeezed\u2014closure of The Post and Prime TV, NGO/cyber laws, and the arrest of Hichilema shrank associational and press space, pulling society down from 6.0 to 4.5. The state's despotic and infrastructural reach grew (surveillance, coercion, Chinese-financed projects), nudging state power up, but the 2020 sovereign default exposed genuinely weak fiscal capacity, capping the rise at a modest +0.5."}
